description: Use this API to set parameters to filter resonances from harmonic analysis frequency scan response. Two criterions are used to filters peaks that could be considered as resonances. Criterion 1: Slow rising resonance peak, specifiy PCTMX1 and DPCTPN1. Criterion 2: Fast rising resonance peak, specifiy PCTMX2 and DPCTPN2. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. har_set_resn_thresholds(realar)

realar.description: current point in percent of maximum peak value (60.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘pctmx1’.
delta previous and delta next points in percent of current point (75.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘dpctpn1’.
current point in percent of maximum peak value (20.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘pctmx2’.
delta previous and delta next points in percent of current point (85.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘dpctpn2’.
